name: io.github.juanklagos/sdd-mcp
description: Spec-Driven Development workflow: specs, plans, gates, status and logbook tools. Bilingual EN/ES.

environmentVariables.name: SDD_PROJECT_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to the SDD workspace (project with specs/ or a spec/ sidecar). Defaults to the current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: SDD_WORKSPACES_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Where sdd_create_workspace creates ./www/<project-name>. Defaults to the current working directory.
